claim: The glossary sync test shall fail when a defined vocabulary term is not used anywhere in the framework.
why: Atom of R-glossary-sync-test (dead-term concern). Dead terms accumulate noise and mislead operators. ENFORCED 2026-07-13: TestAuditGlossarySync_FlagsDeadTerms in internal/generator/open_unenforced_glossary_test.go mechanically verifies this claim.
